name: Kahlua Mousse
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Dark sweet chocolate (cut in pieces)
recipeInstructions:
1. In the top of a double boiler, melt chocolate and butter over simmering water.
2. In a large bowl, combine powdered sugar, egg yolks, Kahlua, and instant coffee powder.
3. Blend in the melted chocolate mixture.
4. Whip the cream until stiff peaks form; fold into the Kahlua-chocolate mixture.
5. Beat egg whites until soft peaks form; gently fold into the mixture.
6. Spoon the mousse into dessert glasses.
7. Refrigerate for 4 hours or overnight.
8. Top, if desired, with whipped cream, chocolate curls and mint leaves.
(6 to 10 servings)
